postings.title: Wireless Firmware Engineer (Starlink Mobile)
top_requirements: Hands-on experience designing and validating wireless communication systems, including firmware development for Starlink Mobile
Proficiency in developing novel wireless communication systems, including those for global cellular connectivity from space
Experience with RF system analysis, including noise figure, gain, IIP3, and EVM characterization
postings.summary: This role involves developing and validating wireless communication systems for Starlink Mobile, including firmware development and RF system analysis. The candidate will have hands-on experience with wireless communication systems and proficiency in developing novel systems.

postings.title: Senior FPGA Engineer, LEO Payload FPGA
top_requirements: Experience with FPGA design and development for LEO payload systems
Proficiency in designing and implementing digital signal processing algorithms for satellite communication systems
Knowledge of satellite communication systems, including modulation, coding, and signal processing techniques
postings.summary: This role involves designing and developing FPGA systems for LEO payload, including digital signal processing algorithm development. The candidate will have experience with FPGA design and proficiency in satellite communication systems.

postings.title: Sr. Connectivity Systems Engineer, Connectivity Systems
top_requirements: Experience with wireless architecture design for consumer electronics devices
Proficiency in designing and implementing connectivity systems, including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular technologies
Knowledge of RF system analysis, including noise figure, gain, IIP3, and EVM characterization
postings.summary: This role involves designing and implementing wireless architecture for consumer electronics devices, including connectivity systems and RF system analysis. The candidate will have experience with wireless architecture design and proficiency in connectivity systems.

postings.title: AI Audio Codec Algorithm and Standardization Engineer
top_requirements: Experience with audio codec algorithm development and standardization for immersive audio technologies
Proficiency in designing and implementing audio signal processing algorithms, including noise reduction and echo cancellation
Knowledge of audio coding standards, including MPEG and AC-3
postings.summary: This role involves developing and standardizing audio codec algorithms for immersive audio technologies, including audio signal processing algorithm development. The candidate will have experience with audio codec development and proficiency in audio signal processing.

postings.title: Senior Frontend PHY IC Design Engineer (DSP focus)
top_requirements: Experience with Wi-Fi chip design, including PHY layer development and DSP implementation
Proficiency in designing and implementing wireless communication systems, including Wi-Fi and Bluetooth technologies
Knowledge of wireless communication standards, including IEEE 802.11 and Bluetooth
postings.summary: This role involves designing and implementing Wi-Fi chip systems, including PHY layer development and DSP implementation. The candidate will have experience with Wi-Fi chip design and proficiency in wireless communication systems.

postings.title: Communication Systems Engineer
top_requirements: Experience with communication systems design and development for defence applications
Proficiency in designing and implementing communication protocols, including TCP/IP and UDP
Knowledge of communication system security, including encryption and authentication techniques
postings.summary: This role involves designing and developing communication systems for defence applications, including communication protocol development and communication system security. The candidate will have experience with communication systems design and proficiency in communication protocols.
